replies_today.reply: The Trump EPA, under Lee Zeldin, officially rescinded the 2009 Obama-era Endangerment Finding. This action eliminated the legal basis for federal regulation of greenhouse gases, a move Zeldin called the "single largest deregulatory action in U.S. history."
That Trump/Serena video is from April 2015, opening a tennis facility. Not recent. Multiple outlets covered it then and now. The "everybody loves Trump" is just a generalization.
The Trump administration didn't "find" this; a conservative think tank (FGA) analyzed state data. While luxury cars were linked to food stamp recipients in one state, the framing misleads.
This "Schumer Shutdown" refers to late 2025. The claim about Schumer wanting money for "illegals" lacks factual support in reporting. The shutdown was a bipartisan disagreement.
